prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次26330、2026年物理类考生大幅增加约46%带来的竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升的吸引力、以及招生计划仅微扩1人的供给约束，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年略有后移（位次数字增大）。预测最低位次约26533名，区间26033–27033名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13940 → 17335 → 44515 → 34819 → 26330. In 2023, due to the splitting of major groups, there was an abnormal significant backward shift, rebounding to 34819 in 2024, and further recovering to 26330 in 2025, showing a clear forward trend in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 26330. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan: 89 in 2021 → 88 in 2022 → 94 in 2023 → 106 in 2024 → 97 in 2025 → 98 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a slight expansion of 1 student, an increase of about 1%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a continuous rise in recent years (65th in 2021 → 57th in 2026), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and reputation. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced some negative public opinion due to a controversy over professor assessment. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 73, rated as 'average', with moderately low exposure on short video platforms, showing no significant surge in application popularity. Law is rated A (member of the Five Academies and Four Schools), Applied Economics is A-, with dual core advantages in finance and law, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Law was assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see', with popularity declining compared to 2023 but still attractive. Finance/Finance/Economics categories are 'divergent and wait-and-see' (65.49), with a slight warming trend. Computer Science is 'recommended' (67.8) but significantly cooling. Electronics/Communication is 'highly recommended' (76.86). In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is estimated at about 380,000 (based on historical proportions), a substantial increase of about 46% compared to 260,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and recruits across provinces in Jiangsu. In recent years, the Physics Category enrollment plan in Jiangsu has been stable at 90–106 students, with 98 in 2026, showing no significant change in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 26330, the intensified competition due to a roughly 46% increase in Physics Category examinees in 2026, the attractiveness of the university's rising Soft Science ranking, and the supply constraint of only a 1% expansion in enrollment, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26533, with a range of 26033–27033.

It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, Tier 1 majors can be used as reach targets (requiring a ranking better than 26000), and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. Law (A discipline) and finance/economics majors are the university's core strengths, so priority should be given to Law, Economics and Management Experimental Class, Accounting, and other majors that combine academic strength with social popularity.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2294 → 2889 → 4597 → 3681 → 3741. In 2023, due to the splitting of major groups, there was a noticeable backward shift. In 2024–2025, it stabilized in the 3681–3741 range, remaining basically flat in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is about 3741. The provincial History Category enrollment plan: 68 in 2021 → 71 in 2022 → 72 in 2023 → 67 in 2024 → 68 in 2025 → 73 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 expands by 5 students, an increase of about 7.4%, the highest planned number in the past six years, which is favorable for candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, approximately 57th in 2026, with a continuous rise in recent years (65th in 2021 → 57th in 2026), steadily improving overall strength. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced slightly negative public opinion due to a professor assessment controversy. On Douyin, the comprehensive popularity ranking is 73rd, rated as "average," with no abnormal signals in application popularity. Law is rated A (member of the Five Academies and Four Schools), Applied Economics is rated A-, with a dual core advantage in finance and law. Most History Category majors are related to these fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law was assessed as "divergent and wait-and-see" in 2024, with declining popularity but still retaining brand appeal. Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics categories are "divergent and wait-and-see" (65.49), with a slight warming trend. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in the province is approximately 141,000 (estimated based on historical proportion), a significant increase of about 45% compared to 97,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and recruits across provinces in Jiangsu. In recent years, the History Category plan has been stable in the 67–73 range, with 73 in 2026 being the highest, showing a clear expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3741, the intensified competition due to a roughly 45% increase in History Category candidates in 2026, the positive attraction of the university's rising ranking, and the supply increase of a 7.4% enrollment expansion, multiple factors offset each other, leading to slightly intensified competition and a small backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3936, with a range of 3436–4436.
